description: Benchmark reference fixture for winter signed ventilation subcomponent totals with mechanical and natural split.
method: Energy Calculation equivalence / Annual 8760 Energy Balance Signed Components
sourceReference: Internal benchmark reference values derived from constant signed hourly mechanical and natural ventilation component loads; no external equivalence claim.
assumptions: Magnitude component fields are aggregated as non-negative kWh.
Net component fields preserve the sign of hourly balance values.
VentilationW is the aggregate of mechanicalVentilationW and naturalVentilationW.
Infiltration remains separate from aggregate ventilation.
notes: This fixture verifies deterministic signed mechanical and natural ventilation benchmark comparison.
